description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a sleek, black finish and a compact, angular design. The rifle features a skeletonized stock with a pronounced cheek rest and a pistol grip integrated into the lower receiver. A detachable box magazine is inserted in front of the trigger guard, and the upper receiver is equipped with a red dot sight mounted on a Picatinny rail. The barrel is long and cylindrical, extending well past the handguard, and appears to have a suppressor or similar muzzle device attached. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, giving it a lightweight yet robust appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, red dot sight, and a long barrel with a suppressor. It features a detachable box magazine and a sleek, angular design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the skeletonized stock, pistol grip, red dot sight, and long barrel with muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, handguard, and the alignment of the sight system.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock structure.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's cheek rest and the alignment of the upper receiver and sight.
